title: end Update (Enderite & Biome Expansion)
description: Ever want an end update? Then download this mod and get it with 4 new biomes and tons to explore, get out and face the end
body: This mod adds what we have all been waiting for...An end update now —you may be asking, "What do you mean by an end update?" Well, I am glad you asked, because let me tell you: introducing 4 new biomes, a brand-new tool tear, a bunch of advancements, and more. Download the mod and find out for yourself (currently in alpha). Snapshot day is Wednesday for CurseForge and Friday for Modrinth, may not release if no update is made
